specializations: Synthetic biology platform-as-a-service for cosmetic actives
Strain engineering and fermentation development for beauty ingredients
Enzyme engineering for cosmetic active production
Biotechnology partnerships with personal care brands
product_highlights: Cell programming platform — world's most automated organism engineering foundry enabling rapid development of new biotech actives
Fragrance molecule biosynthesis — production of rare and complex aromatic compounds via engineered microorganisms
Custom enzyme engineering — design-to-manufacture service for novel cosmetic ingredient enzymes
Partnership model — cosmetic brands co-develop proprietary biotech actives via Ginkgo's foundry model
notes: Ginkgo Bioworks is Boston-based synthetic biology company operating the world's largest and most automated cell programming foundry. For the personal care industry, Ginkgo offers a platform-as-a-service model that enables cosmetic ingredient companies and brands to co-develop novel biotech actives — from fragrance molecules to enzymes and functional proteins — without building their own fermentation infrastructure. Their partnerships with major fragrance houses and personal care ingredient suppliers enable production of rare botanical molecules, complex terpenes, and performance actives at commercial scale with dramatically reduced environmental impact compared to conventional extraction or chemical synthesis.
